emails.body: Jeff--it would be great if you could be on the internal call tomorrow at 2 to help us think through legislative issues, including AB X 27. Any chance we can get a spot of your time? Forwarded by Mike D Smith/HOU/EES on 03/05/2001 06:01 PM From: Michele Curtis/Western Region/The Bentley Company@Exchange on 03/05/2001 05:40 PM
